大小单双决窍.【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239142254_64120817<br>vk.com/topic-239142228_64621696<br>vk.com/topic-239142255_64032946<br>vk.com/topic-239142236_64448996<br>vk.com/topic-239142230_65182487<br>vk.com/topic-239142234_64120822<br>vk.com/topic-239142241_65773540<br>vk.com/topic-239142257_65562255<br>vk.com/topic-239142264_64120838<br>vk.com/topic-239142265_64032967<br>vk.com/topic-239142186_64449010<br>vk.com/topic-239142231_65773552<br>vk.com/topic-239136421_65773557<br>vk.com/topic-239142260_65182486<br>vk.com/topic-239142225_64032999<br>vk.com/topic-239142252_64735075<br>vk.com/topic-239120538_64621764<br>vk.com/topic-239142246_64449055<br>vk.com/topic-239058785_64033012<br>vk.com/topic-239084240_65182552<br>vk.com/topic-239120418_64621769<br>vk.com/topic-239142202_64735108<br>vk.com/topic-239137216_64449011<br>vk.com/topic-239142177_65562335<br>vk.com/topic-239142180_65182579<br>vk.com/topic-239142222_64735124<br>vk.com/topic-239142199_64897217<br>vk.com/topic-239142187_65562339<br>vk.com/topic-239142179_64897221<br>vk.com/topic-239095572_64735121<br>vk.com/topic-239142195_64033043<br>vk.com/topic-239142183_64292195<br>vk.com/topic-239142176_64449085<br>vk.com/topic
